open vertical bar p with rightwards arrow on top close vertical bar equals 4 comma space space open vertical bar q close vertical bar equals 5 space d a n space s u d u t space a n t a r a space v e k t o r space p with rightwards arrow on top space d a n space space q with rightwards arrow on top space a d a l a h space 120 to the power of o space m a k a space p with rightwards arrow on top. q with rightwards arrow on top a d a l a h....
